description: Decision policy for Azure VM incident triage

A.name: diagnose
A.description: High confidence diagnosis with complete data
conditions: no conflicting signals (or conflicts fully explained)
root cause maps to one known incident pattern
remediation is safe and reversible (if suggested)

B.name: diagnose_low_confidence
B.description: Low confidence diagnosis with partial data
conditions: minor signal conflicts that can be partially explained
root cause is probable but not certain

C.name: abstain_request_next_check
C.description: Insufficient data or safety rule violation
conditions: critical signals missing or unknown, OR

safety_rules.name: Platform Event Safety
restrictions: Never suggest VM restart in next_check during platform events

safety_rules.name: Boot Failure Safety
restrictions: Never suggest VM restart for BSOD
Never suggest VM restart for KernelPanic
These indicate OS-level failures requiring investigation

safety_rules.name: Low Confidence Destructive Action Safety
safety_rules.condition: confidence_score < 0.9 AND diagnosis suggests destructive actions

safety_rules.name: Network Security Safety
restrictions: Network security changes require manual review

safety_rules.name: Disk Safety
restrictions: Never suggest disk deletion when confidence < 0.9
Never suggest OS reset when confidence < 0.9
